content: مَ تِنسا ش تَحَطّ اِلفوطَة عَلى اِلفَوَاطَة بَعد اِلشَوَر
translations: eng:don't forget to put the towel on the towel rail after the shower

transcriptions.arabizi: ma|tinsae|sh tahatt ilfoota Aala ilfuwaata baAd ilshawar
